data: As we were taking the dogs out we saw what we initially thought was some low flying aircraft, except it was moving way too fast
A reflective vertical oval shape shifting horizontal, purple, red, green lights.
One large orange star orb in the sky for extended period (30mins-1hr) that slowly moved eventually speeding up breaking into multiple
It was in the sky it was triangle shape and not high in the sky but not too low, it was hovering and a beam came out of it
I was went out to drink water and suddenly i saw that something is hovering in sky so i observe first and then i called my wife to see.
Glowing orb seen in sky. Completely static. Dissappeared than briefly reappeared
ENE of my location about 1 mile away, small black object I watched as it flew in a straight line toward a small cloud.
10 minute sighting bright light moving erratically at high speed
Looked up at the sky and saw a bright white orb which steadily moved to the right and then disappeared into clear sky.
A fiery, orange object slowly moved across the road, from N to SW.
We walked outside to see this object come thru upper atmosphere and skip back into spce
4 large floating orbs with lights around each orb, and they slowly separated and then came back together in formation. Then disappeared
Bright white light over Stanlow oil refinery
Bright white silent point of light, cloud level, straight-line trajectory
White orb in the sky not moving and then shoot straight up through the clouds.
It was a black flying saucer with dim humming lights and not to high from the ground
The speed at which the object was traveling was like something I’ve never seen before
I saw two hovering orange orbs off my back yard over the ocean.
A large dark grey triangle with a dull light on each corner. Rotating clockwise. Went across the sky in about 8 seconds south to north
Green light dots was doing circles , hovering and flashing a green light into the land field
The object was darting all over in one area of the sky
Five low looking meteors in a curved formation, it seemed to have split.
Similar to the Hudson Valley sightings
I was working by the window, I saw that shape changing and moving like a worm.
I was sitting in traffic heading east bound on the bridge. When I noticed a 2 extremely bright green / chrome looking fireballs

It was an oval-ish glowing light. It looked like someone stuck a mirror in the sky. It disappeared in the blink of an eye.

I saw a bright white beam span acrossed the sky, leaving a white vapor trail.
I was stargazing, it looked like a bright normal size star then when it chased me, it was huge

Helicopter or small plane following red orb
Looked up and saw what appeared to be a satellite traveling south to north
No sound, very high up, bean shaped.
Oval UFO with orange lights partially hidden in "clouds" - it was not a cloudy night but the UFO had some kind of a fog around it
Orangish red orb that flared then reappeared as 2 orbs the. 5 orbs in a row
Strange orb flying over my house
Out walking. Saw three orbs one large blue one two smaller ones red and the other green. All following or playing with each other.
The Cube one had white lights at the corners and at the center a yellow and red light next to each other turning on when one went off
I was in a car when the whitish yellow dot flew fast but almost parallel to the car.
It was a long black object with lights along the side of it I watched it with my wife for about 5 minutes
3 ‘stars’ in a triangle flying fast with 1 star either side of the base of the triangle
Chrome metallic pinwheel with spokes inside and traveling faster than we were at 70 mph. Lights on it at random came on
Cigar Shaped Object hovering 300 yards from Highway just over the tree tops.
It was shaped like a cigar with many lights filling it inside.
Huge craft low altitude then the bottom ejected a white ball or orb
Mirror like object was rectangular/square-shaped, at least 150 feet wide - massive — easily the size of a large aircraft or bigger
Quick sighting of chevron moving east to west
Saw orange light through the trees. Started going up fast then started moving fast towards me. Then starts flashing fast clear red.
Large metallic sphere moving across the sky
Orb flying estimated at 2,000 miles per hour
Saw a light moving up , down and sideways. After reviewing my video it shows a craft of some sort
Aircraft following treeline of n lake samish
Distant light became aware of being filmed and went from houses away to my own backyard
I incorrectly thought, at the time, that I could see Artemis II descending from my location. I looked west and saw a comet-like object.
Sitting in field with tree line, hovered then moved behind tree
Home stargazing, saw a faint dull red light speed WNW overhead for 4–5 seconds, then fade; no FlightRadar match.
First 8 was lights moving in opposite directions. Second, 4 lights in total. One got bigger and brighter then went to original dimmer.
Bright light turned from small to large orb
Multi-color changing object observed vibrating and moving rapidly over Vancouver, WA; captured on video at 25x zoom.
3 independent lights rotating in a triangular formation
White orb dropped out of clouds, performs a wiggle and then ascends back into the clouds in the same path it fell.
3 lights rising in a straight formation and dissipating one after another
First, it was a glowing orb. It went into the cloud and you could see it was a cylindrical Craft.
It was a blackish orange and it was an orb almost like an egg shape
Two Oval or Orb craft tailing each other at enormous speed.

1st noticed while Rangeline & going home. Then watch on deck of home. I took pic and video w my phone.
Weird circle ball appearing to be on fire going through atmosphere.
I saw what looks like a spotlight in the sky moving toward the left
It looked like a cone shape flowing out from a single point traveling relatively slow (like most airplanes at higher heights).
Moving slowly across sky the lights were in 2 or 3 layers on top each other it was rotating
Almost a X pattern with almost a changing shape
Zoom in very quickly, circle around made sudden stops, then made tight circle banks left in great speed

White light pulsing then changing shape and color

Looked like moving stars but changed trajectory and speeds multiple seen, some changed trajectory to fly next to each other
4 people saw it and all were confused and couldn't fully make it out before it left. It might have been diamond shape
I saw 3 Orange orbs to begin with and they multiplied and decreased in number multiple times and the highest amount of craft seen was 8
10 glowing red lights, silently moving in formation due northeast until disappearing into clouds

Five very bright white lights closely seperated seen thru a hazy morning sky.
A bright yellow colored object flying at really high speed in night sky
Sparkly ufo that stayed in same spot for a long time- then moved slowly back and forth, and then slowly away from us. Bright lights.
Saw 3 objects in a diamond formation moving VERY fast from S to N.
3 moving light orbs in the sky, moving slowly but erratically

As I looked up at the partially cloudy sky, I noticed a small, bright white light moving north to south somewhat erratically, pulsating

Two flashing lights in the sky (white lights) they did not appear to be attached to any commercial or private aircraft.
I saw these UFO objects 10+ times again starting, they are hexagonal disks

6-8 Sattelite like lights disappear instantly in the sky.
Chevron shaped object in the area, sped up toward 93 south
Lights/ color was changing like a flame, reflection or rotation or a centipede crawling or like a roll not a spin
Unidentified luminous object with unusual, non-drone flight characteristics paced a moving vehicle before suddenly vanishing upon reach
Classic metallic grey half meter size sphere floating in the air
Small to midsize black orb. No means of propulsion, silent
A clump of lights shaped in a rectangle that had bright white lights that turned on and off every half second
it was a very big i thought it was the end of time it was the size of a city I have a video of my reaction I was very concerned
3 lights in diamond formation raced across the sky, from S to N, in a fraction of the time it would take a plane.
A dark circle with two blueish lights coming out of it. It went forward and disappeared.
A light appeared and it was really low going really slow headed west. We watched it for at least 5 mins going west then disappears.
Cigar shaped craft - pulsed once, flying quickly
Not moving despite strong winds , straight up, maybe 5000 feet, not small
Solid white light moving in eastward direction at low altitude, completely silent, no navigation lights.
Large triangular black craft with no lights and low humming sound passed very slowly in a straight line over our & our neighbor's house
Vehicle passed nearly overhead at between 1,000 and 2,000 feet agl. The vehicle had no visible flight surfaces and there was no sound.
One light seen doing a circle formations with 4 going straight across the sky and then breaking apart.
The first craft was cigar shaped with a bright red light on one end. The other craft was oval shaped and the color white.
Three bright orbs over San Diego Bay 4/14/25 at 8:15PM. Two departed, one stationary with no nav lights remained 7+ hours gaining alt
A large fuzzy orb above the Constelation Hercules, large spiral in binocular. Bight object in center that split and moved apart.
Boomerang shaped ufo with collection of tiny very dim lights moving smoothly NW before fading from view
Three white lights, triangular form. Gliding and brief disappearance.
This craft keeps appearing by my farmhouse every Wednesday on the dot at 9:30 PM near Zearing Iowa. It l morphed into a cube shape.
Scorpion-ish shaped lights going up and down, back and forth, kind of floating in the same 4 areas every night out our house windows
White sphere weaving in contrail at HIGH altitude
White light then light stopped dark disk kept going
Light in the shape of a ball flashing simultaneously and disappeared in the sky.
No sound and wasn't a drone- literally over the runway
We were riding on the highway and at first we thought it was Mars but it instantly disappeared
Approx 400 feet high flew over air force base - Northern to southern part of sky
Silver orb slowly moved away from sighting location
Pulsating Orb to Rectangle with Lights
First seen on a direction NW to SE at a considerable speed for the perceived distance. Disappeared upwards. Appeared again on a S to N
V-shape lights or triangle not really sure, flying west to east
Night after meteor shower, moving in irregular flight path, observed naked eye + camera
Unidentified Flying Object. Too large to be a balloon, star, or planet. But too small to be the moon.
Unmoving in sky for over 20 minutes. 10 plus miles out, colors change rapidly from red, green, white and blue blue
Saw a large Ferris wheel-sized object while driving home; it noticed us, followed us, hovered above our driveway, then shot off.
Multiple lights going in all directions Northeast of Presidio, Tx. Lights appeared for 30 plus minutes.
Seen lights dropping out of sky as if entering our atmosphere they were dropping down as light faded as they got closer to horizon
Spotted orb object heading west/southwest at about 1500 to 2000 ft at a slow rate of speed as sending slowly
Saw four distinct flaming objects descend towards the ground slowly and seemingly under direction.
I saw it, it was going maybe MACH 4, it took two seconds for it to pass overhead
Very bright white luminescent lights with two stationary bright lights hovering around this area
This craft was moving erratically over head the street. it had flashing green white red lights and passed over us multiple times
Hundreds of orbs spotted in my backyard, not drones or planes. They moved slowly and abruptly changed angles
Light in the sky traveling extremely fast and then suddenly stops
Was 10 ft off the ground going down my driveway moving very slow had no sound one propeller on the bottom of the craft silver
Saw bright round still object above Selah WA with dimmer one below. After 10-15 min, first moved/changed shape; second followed.
I saw a circular shape hovering near my home, with black interior, and what appeared to be flames outlining it.
Light appeared, as if through a wormhole. Floated around, disappeared, reappeared, disappeared again through a wormhole.
Extremely bright star, twinkling, stationary, with erratic sudden slight movements
Two moving lights in nearly the same direction.
I was looking at the big dipper and I saw a bright red circle that flew towards 2 satellites and then flew straight up and disappeared.
a blue light that was moving at high speed.
Bright lights. Object hovering in the sky.
4 bright lights on the bottom, lights going around bright like stadium lights. Looked as if it was hovering over the house.
Bright ball of light appeared suddenly, winked in and out then disappeared before moving out of reasonable visual range.
Three UFOs fling in a triangle formation. Coming from the south going north. The one farthest north stopped about us.
It was an oblong object with red lights that moved vertically top to bottom and slowly descended downward.
They are still here. They implanted devices in me. They are recording me and tracking me.
No noise. Triangular shaped and possibly black. and at least 200ft wide at around 10,000 feet.
I was standing outside and I seen a triangle formation, then I started seeing different ones flying around , some fast some slow
I saw an egg like craft shimmering traveling fast then hid behind a cloud when it saw me. Impossible turns.
Was flying very fast as soon as we saw it was shaped like a figure 8 but became a circle as it got higher
Object disappeared, reappeared, still and moving slowly white shifting colors
2 fixed stars,instanly moved from a standstill position,while I was looking directly at them
A 8 shaped craft went upwards and dissapeared into the clouds changing color when altitude increased
An odd light southwest, got my iPhone. It was moving, to me, erratically shape seemed to change from circular to dronelor plane like th
Flashing light blinking on and off every second, moving west to east, then changed direction and went south.
Triangle in shape from when it hovered vertical showing red and yellow lights on bottom. Than proceeded forward with yellow lights
Thin object with no visible wings or tail, it vanished after I tried to look at it through binoculars.
4 bright lights on the bottom, lights going around bright like stadium lights. Looked as if it was hovering over the house.
Smooth objects with abnormal speed, moving chaotically, quite bright and noticeable. They suddenly flew away after half an hour.
Stream of high altitude lights running from north to south in constant stream. From horizon to horizon
UAP appearing in sky above early morning horizon trailing a fan shaped contrail
An orange, marbled orb appeared from behind the clouds.
Got home from work at 6:40 pm. Looked up and seen the object moving across sky.
3 really bright lights flew over my house, with a low bass hum
It was a series of sightings. The most recent was several clusters in the sky. They are too close to be "satellites."
Two witnesses observed multiple orb-like lights near Homolovi/Winslow, Arizona, for approximately 45 minutes
Black triangle with 3 dim white lights, one in each corner. It flew south to north at a steady speed without making any noise
Object moving beyond gravity speeds horizontal very bright light in center
Cigar shaped craft slowly descending from a very high altitude leaving a plume.
On boat fish took 2 pictures of object not moving
Seven white round objects covering for about 10 minutes in different formations and then took off supersonic fast.
What I saw stayed in formation until, one by one they disappeared.
Silver circular/spherical object flying east to west in sky IVO Reno airport. Object then began rising until it disappeared from sight.
4 disks at an angle flying across the sky low and fast and they disappearing straight up
Round metalic with a thickened band in the middle and an attenea...not sure of scale but it didn't seem very big. 2' diameter roughly.
Saucer shaped, silver. Aware of being perceived, carpenter bee like moving when perceived
Small object flies past artemis while returning to earth
Two large bright white vertical oval lights, stationary, symmetric left to right over Taizhou, China
A white blue orb ball went from top of trees out into the open, turned on and off 4-5 times and was closer every time to us
I was asleep and was awakened by flashing lights that looked like lightning. The light was so bright I saw them with my eyes closed.
White light the size of an average star moving erratically in the night sky.
Metallic looking 45-50 mph moving in a straight line direction due south of the highways. Clear sky. No visible exhaust small suv size.
Bright meteor appearance. But solid silver body. Coming from sky and quickly disappearing. Smoke trail also vanished within seconds.
Very big like a brown color and I can see like types and everything on it it popped up over I-75 set for about 5 Seconds then shut off
It was following a plane going the same speed and same direction. It suddenly disappeared.
Photo taken from a Trail Camera at a Cattle Mutilation Site.

Oval shaped aircraft seen from above out of an airplane window
It was a great day out so I took some pictures of the sky until I saw this silver disk
2 sightings same day at Stone Mountain with my son
